headline: First standup: creative pipeline fired & replaced, 21 posts awaiting your review, World Cup window is the play
summary: Content engine rebuilt today on your three corrections: real photos instead of text cards, plain simple English, trend-first. Batches 05 (trends), 06 (science facts + life quotes), 07 (product features) are drafted — 21 posts awaiting your approve/deny on the posts page.
12 finished composites baked (real photography + brand overlay): science-fact cards, quote cards, memes, and a 4-step how-it-works carousel.
Approval page upgraded: instant approved/denied feedback, pick-one lock with a Change link, working Done button, and a new ✨ Improve button that turns your comment into a revision brief.
Agent performance reviewed for the first time — one pipeline fired, one agent rehired on a tightened contract, one new hire (this standup). Scorecards live in docs/operations/agent-performance.md.
Still blocked on you (unchanged): AI-video tool (5+ video posts waiting), giveaway prize, image-moderation provider.

agents.name: social-media-growth
agents.metric: owner corrections per batch: 3 → target 0; % drafts approved unedited
agents.note: Contract v2: photo-led, plain English, science/quote/feature pillars, improve-on-comment duty.

agents.name: Text-card creative pipeline
agents.note: Replaced by real-photo + baked-composite pipeline (licensed Pexels photography).

agents.name: Builder (experience loop)
agents.metric: tickets shipped w/ full DoD; 0 broken deploys
agents.note: Strongest performer: safety bundle, invites, survey, onboarding, Gmail delivery.

agents.name: Tester / User-sim
agents.note: Must run in isolated worktree; next collision → contract rewrite.

agents.name: standup-scribe
agents.metric: standup live on HQ by 06:15 daily
agents.note: Cloud routine, first unattended run next 06:00.

directions.title: Ratify the fire/rehire slate
directions.detail: Fired: the text-card creative pipeline (you rejected its output). Rehired: social-media-growth on contract v2 (photo-led, plain English, new pillars). Hired: standup-scribe (this 06:00 report). Tester on probation with mandatory worktree isolation.
directions.recommendation: Approve — already reflected in the agent definitions; your denial reverts the contracts.

directions.title: Make the World Cup window (now → Jul 19) the primary growth push
directions.detail: The knockout stage is running and the final lands Jul 19 — the single biggest attention wave a sports-meetup brand will get this year. Batch 05 has two dated World Cup posts; more variants ship while the window is open, other experiments yield priority.
directions.recommendation: Approve — costs nothing extra; time-sensitive posts are dated so nothing goes stale.

directions.title: Adopt product-feature posts as a recurring weekly pillar
directions.detail: Batch 07 tests feature-led content (location privacy, no-grid-of-faces, how-it-works, dating/friendship/group). If its follows-per-post holds up against the relatable pillars after ~2 weeks, one feature post ships every week.
directions.recommendation: Approve — feature posts double as honest product education.

directions.title: Park the remaining unapproved text-card drafts (batches 02–04)
directions.detail: The fired pipeline's leftover drafts are text-only cards in the style you rejected. Parking them clears the queue for photo-led content; anything worth keeping gets remade with real photos.
directions.recommendation: Approve — nothing already approved or scheduled is touched.

directions.title: Re-raising the AI-video tool decision (existing HQ card #1)
directions.detail: Short-form video is the top reach format; 5+ approved-or-drafted video posts sit awaiting-asset. This stays the biggest blocked growth lever and only you can provision a paid tool (~€20–30/mo).
directions.recommendation: Approve = you'll provision one this week; deny = video stays parked and the mix stays photo-only.
